entity.summary: France-based BTC/EUR exchange operated by Paymium. Bitcoin-Central launched in December 2010, resumed service in September 2013 after a prolonged closure, and was renamed Paymium on June 23, 2014, ending the Bitcoin-Central brand while the underlying exchange business continued.
entity.notes: HEI now models Bitcoin-Central as rebranded rather than merely inactive. Contemporary transition messaging states that the Bitcoin-Central marketplace became Paymium on 2014-06-23 and that customer accounts and trading services continued under the Paymium name. successor_id remains null until Paymium is represented by a canonical entity.

expected.summary: France-based BTC/EUR exchange operated by Paymium. Bitcoin-Central launched in December 2010, later announced a regulated banking / payment-institution framework in December 2012, and relaunched in September 2013 after a months-long closure. HEI models it as inactive because available sources mark the historical exchange as discontinued but do not establish a clean terminal shutdown date.
expected.notes: HEI models Bitcoin-Central as inactive rather than dead because the historical service is marked discontinued, but the current evidence set does not provide a definitive final shutdown announcement or terminal date. Paymium / BTCC-style successor modeling should be handled separately if needed.

changes.summary: France-based BTC/EUR exchange operated by Paymium. Bitcoin-Central launched in December 2010, resumed service in September 2013 after a prolonged closure, and was renamed Paymium on June 23, 2014, ending the Bitcoin-Central brand while the underlying exchange business continued.
changes.notes: HEI now models Bitcoin-Central as rebranded rather than merely inactive. Contemporary transition messaging states that the Bitcoin-Central marketplace became Paymium on 2014-06-23 and that customer accounts and trading services continued under the Paymium name. successor_id remains null until Paymium is represented by a canonical entity.

events.title: Bitcoin-Central was renamed Paymium
events.description: The Bitcoin-Central marketplace changed its name to Paymium on June 23, 2014, consolidating the exchange service and Paymium SAS under one brand while existing customer accounts and trading access continued.
events.notes: This is the terminal brand marker for Bitcoin-Central, not a shutdown of the underlying exchange business.

evidence.title: Bitcoin-Central devient Paymium
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous article reproducing the Paymium CEO's transition message and identifying June 23, 2014 as the effective rename date.

evidence.title: Paymium company history
evidence.notes: Paymium's official company history identifies the service as born under the Bitcoin-Central name and later renamed Paymium.
